steps.title: Spot the September pattern in the data
steps.content: In September, three cities cluster at roughly the same level: Rincón around 6.5 inches, Ponce around 6 inches, and Isabela around 6.5 inches. San Sebastián stands apart at about 11 inches—clearly higher.

steps.title: Match the pattern to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C directly reflects this split: Rincón, Ponce, and Isabela all fall below 8 inches, while San Sebastián exceeds 8 inches.

The other three choices either assign wrong values (B claims about 5 and 10 inches, which don't match the actual readings), make false comparisons (A says Rincón exceeds San Sebastián, which it doesn't), or contradict the data (D says Ponce and San Sebastián are similar when they differ by roughly 5 inches).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
